images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a pristine, brightly lit prototype network rack with three neatly cabled switches standing isolated in clean minimal studio space, while behind it looms a vast shadowed data-center aisle of dense tangled cabling disappearing into darkness — order in the light, chaos in the dark. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent lines only — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
